text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One night, as I'm patrolling the tracks...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see an Umamusume running silently alone. I can't
seem to recall how long she's been out here,
despite patrolling the area for so long.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: Do you always run so much?
Do you always run so much?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: Do you always run so much?
Do you always run so much?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There's someone I want to catch up to... so I have
to keep running too.
choice_data_list: So you're chasing a goal, huh?
So you're chasing a goal, huh?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Night always falls while I'm running. That's why... I
always run... this much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She leaves the track without another word. As I
watch her go, something startling strikes me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe was the only one who left, but
I'm positive I heard more than one set of
footsteps walking away...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing that special... There's just someone
always running ahead of me, and I want to catch
up to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like her clear goal is what drives her to
be so focused.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Are we done now? My friend has left already, so
I should go too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As she leaves, something startling strikes me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe was the only one who left, but
I'm positive I heard more than one set of
footsteps walking away...
